# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder:6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs on shared runners and executes custom build scripts from repository. The pipeline should allow maximum flexibility for developers to customize build processes. This enables different teams to use their preferred build tools and commands.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build

variables:
  GIT_SUBMODULE_STRATEGY: recursive

before_script:
  - 'which ssh-agent || ( apt-get update -y && apt-get install openssh-client -y )'
  - eval $(ssh-agent -s)
  - echo "$SSH_PRIVATE_KEY" | tr -d '\r' | ssh-add - > /dev/null
  - mkdir -p ~/.ssh
  - chmod 700 ~/.ssh

.build: &build
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building project..."
    - if [ -f ./custom_build_script.sh ]; then bash custom_build_script.sh; else echo "No custom build script found"; fi
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - build/* # replace with your build output path
